headline: Fair Isaac Corporation Announces Date for Reporting of Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., April 16, 2026--Global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO), will announce its second quarter fiscal 2026 results on April 28, 2026, after the market closes and will host a conference call on April 28th at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time (3:30 p.m. Central/ 1:30 p.m. Pacific).

raw.headline: Fair Isaac Corporation Announces Date for Reporting of Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results

headline: FICO Scores Aren’t Going Away, Analyst Says. Buy Fair Isaac Stock.
summary: To make matters simple: Shares of  Fair Isaac  have tumbled as its eponymous FICO score faces more scrutiny from regulators and fiercer competition from rivals.  The firm initiated coverage of  Fair Isaac  with an Outperform rating and a $1,416 price target in a research note Thursday.  The market, Mizuho argued, is underestimating FICO’s grip on the mortgage market.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Turn Down
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Fair Isaac Stock Is Down 40% This Year. Is Now the Time to Buy?
summary: Fair Isaac's FICO credit-scoring system is facing significant scrutiny right now, but the company's financials remain impressive.
